title: OpenAI Says It Has A Plan To Ensure AI Benefits Everyone, Not Just A Few
summary_full: In a new blog post, OpenAI says artificial general intelligence should empower billions of people rather than remain concentrated in the hands of a handful of companies or governments.
summary_public: In a new blog post, OpenAI says artificial general intelligence should empower billions of people rather than remain concentrated in the hands of a handful of companies or governments.
